## Source Name

Name of the job board or platform.

## URL

Link to the job source website.

## API Documentation

Link to API docs (if available).

## Free Tier Available?

- [ ] Yes, a free tier or free API access is available
- [ ] No, paid access only
- [ ] Unknown

## Additional Details

Any other relevant information about the source (rate limits, data format, authentication method, etc.).
